greeting: Hey there! 🦊 Welcome to Sharkbait Radio - SharkbaitRadioStation.FM. Reply with MENU to see what I can help with!
away: Thanks for reaching out to Sharkbait Radio! We're off air right now but will get back to you soon. Meanwhile try REQUEST or SCHEDULE.

keywords.reply:
🦊 Sharkbait Radio Menu:
- REQUEST: request a song
- SCHEDULE: see our show schedule
- SHARKBAIT: learn about us
Reply with a keyword any time!
🎶 Want to hear a song? Just reply with the song name and artist and we will try to queue it up on air!

📅 Sharkbait Radio Schedule:
Mon-Fri 6am-10am: Morning Bite
Sat 12pm-3pm: Weekend Waves
Check SharkbaitRadioStation.FM for the full lineup!
